semantic_family_contract.matched_ladder_family_reuse: permitted only within one partition across distinct context rungs

split_contract.domain: exact one-cell core stratification in every partition

split_contract.near_duplicate: character and official-token shingle Jaccard hard limits; stricter for training versus evaluation
split_contract.segment_hash: all normalized atomic segments globally unique
split_contract.source_document: disjoint identity and content hash across partitions

semantic_similarity.semantic_redaction: case/whitespace normalized; decimal numbers and long generated identifiers replaced by <variable>
